fn extend_with_uninit(vec: &mut Vec<u8>, additional: usize) {
    let new_len = vec.len() + additional;
    unsafe {
        vec.set_len(new_len);
    }
}

fn build_vec_from_raw(ptr: *const u8, len: usize) -> Vec<u8> {
    let mut result = Vec::with_capacity(len);
    unsafe {
        std::ptr::copy_nonoverlapping(ptr, result.as_mut_ptr(), len);
        result.set_len(len);
    }
    result
}

fn zeroed_vec(len: usize) -> Vec<u32> {
    let mut v = Vec::with_capacity(len);
    unsafe {
        v.set_len(len);
    }
    for item in v.iter_mut() {
        unsafe {
            std::ptr::write(item, 0);
        }
    }
    v
}
